flashcards.front: What is the primary function of the Network Layer?
What is the size of an IPv4 address?
What is the purpose of the Type of Service field in the IPv4 header?
flashcards.back: To specify the type of service required

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the Fragment Offset field in the IPv4 header?
flashcards.back: To specify the offset of the fragment in the original datagram

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the Time to Live field in the IPv4 header?
flashcards.back: To specify the time to live of the datagram
